summary: End-to-end testing of Silkstrand Academy. Backend (7/7 pytest) and Frontend (all core flows) passed. All 6 sections render, nav anchor scroll works, admissions & contact form submissions succeed with proper toasts, events (5 seeded, date-sorted) render from backend, SVG webs + marquee + dangling spider + web-cursor all present.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: @app.on_event startup/shutdown are deprecated in FastAPI; prefer lifespan context manager.

server.py: seed_events references `logger` inside except block before the module-level `logger` is defined (logger assigned on line 169, seed runs at startup). If seeding raises, a NameError would occur. Move logging.basicConfig/logger above startup handler.
server.py: CORS allow_credentials=True combined with allow_origins='*' is rejected by browsers per spec; restrict origins when credentials are enabled.

Minor: adm-program is a Radix Select (button role=combobox). Exposing the underlying value via a hidden input with data-testid or using role-based automation would improve testability. Current default value lets the form submit fine.
seed_data_creation: 5 events auto-seeded by backend on startup; tests create TEST_-prefixed contacts/admissions/events (TEST_Event deleted post-test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests under /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover root, contact (create+list+422 validation), admissions (create+list+empty notes default), events (seeded sort + create/delete + 404). Frontend verified at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — all data-testid selectors matched. Admissions program is a Radix Select (button[role=combobox]); to set it in future Playwright scripts click the trigger then click the option by text (use force=True).
